IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: To provide training and education in the shooting sports.
IRS990.MissionDesc: To provide training and education in the shooting sports.

OtherRevenueMiscGrp.Desc: Amount Sent to State for Unclaimed Property

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Potowatami Area Council of the Boys Scouts
Potowatami Area Council of the Boy Scouts

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The organization voted to dissolve in 2023.
The organization is a State of WI Nonstock Corporation.
The 990 will be provided to the board of directors.
Once the 990 in in draft the document has to be reviewed by the board before it is signed.
No documents available to the public
